summary: Tag each Agricola card with the mechanics/features it uses

cards.note: Passing minor; grants building a free stable but only in a 1-space pasture (adjacency/shape restriction on placement); stable is a game piece.
Passing minor; randomly select and play an occupation for free (grants playing a card = an action); randomness during play.
Passing minor; immediate wood based on plain state read (rooms, rooms>people); NONE-level effect otherwise.
Passing minor; immediate resources conditional on owned majors — plain state read.
Passing minor; immediate food/grain per field type — plain state read.
Passing minor; immediate grain+veg, trivial goods.

Played only via Major Improvement; provides a room (new person holder); permanently removes ability to renovate. E-SUBSTITUTE for it being an improvement acting as a room-add; the renovate-ban is a legality removal. Note: acts as a room-providing improvement replacing a renovation path.
On play gives 1 wild boar; unplanted field tiles become boar holders (new capacity slots on farm tiles).
On play +3 clay then optional free renovation (granted sub-action with cost zeroed = cost modification).
Each time you build >=2 rooms at once, apply a resource discount — cost modification on build-room sub-action.
After using a wood accumulation space, if >=7 wood, optionally build 1 stable for 1 wood; keyed on named wood space + supply-count check.
After the NEXT time you take+fully-accommodate animals from a space, optionally plow 1 field; one-shot (next time) needs a used/armed flag. Keyed on obtaining/accommodating animals.
Once this game, when using Farmland/Cultivation with the first person placed in a round, plow 2 extra fields; one-shot flag + first-person-of-round condition.
On play optionally plow up to 2 fields; the play-cost's +1 food (round-4/5 clause) is a food cost. Round restriction is a plain prereq.
On Build Rooms with more rooms than people, grants a family-growth action + 1 food; clarification caps at exactly 1 growth per build (ST-STORE to track).
Marks a future round space (round + fences-in-supply) where you may place an extra person from supply; returned in returning-home.
After using a Quarry, grants a Major/Minor Improvement action that must spend >=1 stone; may not decline discounts to trigger.
Consider Lessons unoccupied (L-OCCUPY) and replace each food an occupation costs with wood (cost-currency substitution).
On play +2 wood and may immediately build Clay/Stone Oven major at reduced cost (1 clay + 1 stone).
Returning-home each round: optionally pay 1 grain for 1 bonus point; each opponent then gets 1 food.
On a Bake Bread action, may exchange 1 grain for 2 food + 1 bonus point (must bake normally).
Scoring rule: 1 bonus pt per major improvement, capped at unused farmyard spaces; computed at end, no hook.
On building fences, may exchange 1 wood + 1 fence piece from supply for 2 food + 1 bonus point.
Returning-home: if returning a person from Fishing, 2 bonus pts per newborn returned home; needs to know worker was on Fishing.
On play, exchange any number of food for 1 bonus pt each, up to completed harvests count.
On renovate, may pay 1 wood for 1 bonus point + 1 grain.
Card is an action space for all; user gets 3 bonus pts, opponents must pay owner 1 grain to use it.
Each work phase may place an extra person on the first non-accumulating space used by any player while it holds only 1 person; needs to track that specific space.

On play seeds clay on unused farmyard spaces (stack on card); each time a space becomes used you get that clay and may exchange it for 2 food (optional convert). ST-STACK for per-space clay pile. Not L-CARDSPACE actually — remove.
Fires when you upgrade Fireplace to Cooking Hearth (a renovate/build-major sub-action); mandatory +2 wood +1 veg; 'not retroactively' = once.
Each time you use Fishing/Forest space you also get 1 wood/food; automatic per-use.
Building 1+ stables in one turn places 1 food on next 3 round spaces; only on-turn builds trigger (clarification).
Fires once when you first no longer live in a wooden house; schedules food on next 6 round spaces.
Each use of Sheep Market places 1 food on next 2 round spaces.
Immediately schedule 1 food on next N round spaces = number of fences built; plain read of fence count.
After obtaining wood, with >=5 wood may exchange 1 wood->3 food (optional); with >=7 must (mandatory). Multi-fire per intervening event needs provenance tracking.

cards.new_category: REEDBANK-REFILL: hook on 1 reed being placed on a non-empty Reed Bank accumulation space during the preparation-phase refill.
cards.note: Fires when reed is added to a non-empty Reed Bank during preparation refill; not a standard placement/obtain seam — a board-refill event. Timing/seam not cleanly covered.
Each use of Fishing space grants an additional 2 food.
Each use of a wood accumulation space, if boar present on Pig Market, also get 2 food; conditional board-state read.
On play +5 food; at end of each non-harvest round must pay 1 food or take begging marker (recurring toll).
On play, food based on sheep/cattle counts; plain state read + immediate goods.
In returning-home of rounds 8/10/12, optionally take 1 veg from a veg field, exchange for 3 food + 1 bonus point. Removing planted crop = E-CROPMANIP; bonus point = E-SCORE.
After harvesting veg (a sub-action/field phase), conditional convert 1 veg->6 food; optional at 3+, mandatory at 4+ (mand-with-choice). Needs to know harvest just happened.
Return Fireplace/Hearth to play (E-RETURNCOMP); at-any-time good->food conversions plus a bake-bread grain->food rate.
After the field phase of each harvest, optionally use a baking improvement to turn exactly 1 grain into food (not a Bake action).
In feeding phase, optional exchange grain for bonus points + 3 food; scoring bonus tied to the choice.
During field phase, 1 food per grain field harvested.
Before an unconditional Sow sub-action, get 1 grain.
Each time you use an animal accumulation space while already holding that animal type, get 1 grain.
Build fences >= current round number -> 1 veg; count vs current round references round number.
End of each non-harvest round, optionally move 1 veg from a field to supply (crop-on-field manipulation, not a field phase).
Using a Quarry space adds 1 good to each single-crop planted field (changes crops on fields).
After turning 2+ unused spaces to used in one action (plow/build/fence), granted an extra optional Sow sub-action.
Build 1+ stables on your turn -> place wood on next 3 round spaces; off-turn builds excluded.
Start of each work phase, optional exchange 1 grain -> 2 clay + 1 food if you have clay.
On play +1 clay; each time any player uses Pig Market space, get 2 clay (fires on opponent too).
Each time you sow veg, before the sub-action get clay+stone. Sub-action seam, owner, optional gain.
Each use of a building-resource accumulation space places a good on the card (stack), released at scheduled rounds.
After using an action space, optionally take a building resource from a space with >=4 on it.
In returning-home phases with no harvest, may pay 1 grain (even from a field) to breed one type outside the breeding phase.
On play, immediately plow 1 field (granted plow), then pass.
On play gain clay based on current clay count (plain state read), then pass.
On play gain 1 cattle (must be accommodated); passing minor.
Continuous +2 capacity to each existing pasture.
On play +1 clay; continuous rule allowing clay to substitute for wood on fences.
Places a field tile on a future round space; at start of that round may plow it.
Each use of Farmland/Cultivation grants an additional Bake Bread action (optional).
Lets you use a Wish for Children space occupied by one other player's person.
End-game bonus points by pasture farmyard-space coverage threshold (plain threshold).
On play, immediate bonus points + food per remaining complete round (plain state read); one-shot on-play, not end-game scoring rule.
Bonus points at scoring based on house material; mutually-exclusive-style house-material scoring (SCOREGRP for stone-house grouping). Plain threshold read, no optimization.
On play, place 1 food on each of next 3 round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Each time any player uses Cattle Market: you get 3 food, each other player gets 1 food (transfer/gain to others).
At returning-home phase, if >=7 building resources gained in the preceding work phase, get 2 food; needs running count of work-phase gains.
Each time after you build an improvement (a card being played/built), get 1 food.
Immediately after using a wood accumulation space, optional exchange 2 wood for 3 food, returning the 2 wood to the space.
Bake Bread action in the round immediately following a harvest gives 3 extra food; depends on round position relative to harvest rounds.
Each time you use Grain Seeds space, get 1 additional grain.
On play, place 1 vegetable on round spaces 4/7/9 ahead, collected at start of those rounds.
At any time, move 1 crop from a planted field (>=2 crops) to an empty field.
Every improvement costs 1 wood less; always-on cost reduction.
Each time you use Fishing space, get 1 additional food and 1 reed.
Each time you use a stone accumulation space, get 1 additional stone.
Each time you fence a new undivided pasture covering >=4 spaces, get 2 sheep on it; depends on pasture size/shape and animals must be accommodated.
On play, mandatory-fence a new pasture free (no wood); adjacency-to-existing-pasture constraint = L-GEOMFARM; passing minor.
On play gain 1 veg (effectively converting the 1 grain cost); passing minor.
Card itself holds a person (room for 1 person), not a room.
Continuous cost change: wooden rooms cost 2 wood + 2 reed.
On play +1 food; each renovation (a sub-action) grants an optional free stable build (piece from supply, no wood).
Place 2 field tiles on card (stack); twice this game using Farmland grants an optional extra plow from the card; uses-left counter.
Place two people back-to-back if one uses a named animal-market space; extra placement conditioned on specific spaces.
On play +1 food; each occupation played grants an additional optional Bake Bread action.
On play immediate bonus points per round left; then permanently disallows renovation (removes a legality). Score is granted immediately on play, not at game end.
Only a per-person additional play cost (1 clay + 1 food each); no ongoing mechanic. Cost scaling by person count; card text states no further effect.
Field phase of each harvest: sheep-threshold food; plus end-game 1 pt per 3 sheep (E-SCORE).
Place food on next 3 round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Each use of named Fishing space places food on next 3 round spaces (scheduled).
Field phase of each harvest: food per 3 sheep and per 2 cattle.
Each time you use one of four spaces above Fishing -> before-space auto food; the 'above Fishing' set is board-position dependent.
Start of each round, if wooden house, get 1 food; plain state read.
Start of field phase of each harvest, conditional on field composition, get 3 food.
Each time you use Grain Seeds, if Farmland occupied, get 3 food; conditional on a named space's occupancy.
Places grain on rounds 5/8/11/14, collected at start of those rounds.
Card is a field that grows only vegetables.
Places wood on each remaining even round space, collected at round start.
Each time you use Day Laborer, also get 3 clay (spendable for Cottager).
At any time exchange clay for stone at 2/3/4->1/2/3 rate.
Places wild boar on 2 round spaces, collected at round start; animals must be accommodated.
Immediately +5 clay and a Renovation action (must pay cost if taken); passing minor.
Randomly select occupation from hand, either play it for 2 food or pass card left; random draw + fork play-or-pass; passing.
Immediately get wood equal to people on accumulation spaces; needs to know where own workers are placed; passing.
Immediately get 1 good keyed to count of occupations left in hand; plain conditional goods; passing.
Passing minor; immediate stone = person count (plain state read). Passing so E-PASSING.
Passing minor; immediate food scaled by major-improvement count (plain state read).
Choose gain 1 reed OR convert 1 reed->1 cattle; convert + provides animal; passing.
Card holds animals (new holder, capacity = pasture count); after each breeding/feeding phase get food per empty spot.
Card is a new holder for up to 3 same-type animals; not a pasture.
Places a stone room on round space 12; at start of round build free if stone house else discard — scheduled conditional free build.
After using a wood accumulation space, may build exactly 1 pasture using taken wood, one fence free; needs provenance of taken wood.
Each time you use a wood space, pay 2 wood to plow 1 field, paid wood back on space; granted plow sub-action with special cost/placement.
Place a field on a future round space (offset by resource count); at start of that round may plow it.
Place fields on round spaces 7,8,9; at start of each may plow.
Place 4 food stack on card; each time you obtain grain get 1 food from card; once empty grant Family Growth even without room.
Get 2 food; place a temporary person removed next returning-home (post-errata mandatory). Temporary worker.
Take round-14 action space card, only you can use it until placed on board — private exclusive action space.
Each time you use Grain Utilization, may take a Build Fences action instead of one of its two actions — substitute granted action.
After a turn in which you build a room/stable/fence, may take the build-major-improvement action (Joinery/Pottery/Basketmaker) paying its cost; off-turn stables excluded.
After using Forest, may return 2 wood to it to play an occupation for free (waives occupation cost); named-space hook.
Bonus point each turn you use a Lesson space plus a cooking improvement — a fired bonus-point award, not end-game scoring; needs to detect the compound turn condition.

cards.new_category: PALISADE: place 2 wood on a perimeter fence space that functions as a fence and scores 1 VP, bypassing the 15-fence supply limit.
cards.note: Instead of a fence piece, place 2 wood on an edge fence space; functions as a fence, worth 1 bonus point each; overrides fence supply cap.
End-game: 2 bonus points if >=2 orthogonally adjacent unused farm spaces exist (adjacency shape read); negatives still apply.
At any time exchange 1/3/5 grain for 3/4/5 food and 0/1/2 bonus points (tiered convert + fired bonus points).
Next time you take animals from an accumulation space AND fully accommodate them, +1 bonus point each; one-shot, needs armed/spent flag.
Once ever, first moment you reach the sheep threshold, +2 bonus points; count-threshold latch.
On play +1 food; prereqs are HAVE-checks only, trivial.
Continuous restriction: cannot use farm spaces orthogonally adjacent to house until all others used (unless used together in one action); adjacency shape.
Each time you use Fishing or Reed Bank, also get 1 grain and 1 wood; named-space hook.
On play, alternate 2 wood / 1 wild boar on next 4 round spaces (player chooses start); collected at round start; animals must be accommodated.
Card becomes a shared action space: exchange wood for wood+food (tiered); other players pay owner 1 food toll to use it.
Each time you use Grain/Vegetable Seed space, schedule 1 food on next 3/2 round spaces; collected at round start.
Adds rounds 3&4, schedules 2 food each on those round spaces, collected at round start.
Places food/stone on next round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Food-stack on card; wood-space use moves food to supply, stone-space use adds food to card.
After playing an improvement/occupation, if counts equal you get 2 food; needs comparing improvement vs occupation counts.
Each clay-space use grants food equal to wild boar count.
Play restriction computable from state; on play get food equal to current round — plain goods.
End of each non-harvest round, may exchange wood->2food or stone->4food; once per eligible round.
On play +2 food; after unconditional Sow, food per stable.
Food-stack; wood-space use draws 1 food; renovate restocks to 3.
On play +1 food; +1 food per vegetable taken from a field in the field phase.
On-play food depends on whether played on the Major Improvement action space vs elsewhere.
On Fishing use, may pay 1 grain to schedule 1 food on next 6 round spaces.
On Lessons use, before paying occupation cost, may exchange 1 grain for 4 food.
Grain Utilization use while Fishing occupied grants +2 food; needs board occupancy read.
On play, places grain on next 2/3/4 round spaces depending on which resource paid (wood/clay/stone) -- cost forks the reward = E-PLAYVARIANT; future round-space goods = E-SCHED.
Before each Bake Bread sub-action you get grain per person on an accumulation space; clarification makes baking mandatory once grain received = F-AUTO.
At any time pay 4 clay + 2 food to schedule veg on next 2 round spaces; food cost = E-FOODCOST.
Before start of each harvest-round you may buy grain/veg with food; optional buy at a rate = E-CONVERT + E-FOODCOST, fires at start of round.
On play, gain plain goods if harvests-completed equals occupations-played (a plain state read) -- immediate goods only.
Small pastures may also be sown as fields (dual-purpose field/pasture) reducing their animal capacity; sow-in-pasture and treating pasture as field = crop/field rule change.
On play, gain plain goods based on exact room count (plain state read).
Before each play/build of an improvement you get 1 wood usable to pay for it; fires on the Major-or-Minor improvement action.
On play schedules wood on next 5 round spaces; on next renovate the still-promised wood is reclaimed = E-TAKEBACK hooked on renovate sub-action.
On play, place reed on the remaining round-5/8/10/12 spaces.
Each time any player takes >=3 stone from an accumulation space you get 1 stone; keyed on obtaining stone, fires on own and opponent actions.
Before each work phase you may take a resource from an accumulation space holding a threshold amount; depends on accumulation-space contents; optional.
After each harvest you may buy exactly one good with food; optional conversion at a rate, fires after harvest.
On play, stack boar/food/cattle/food/sheep on the card; at any time pay 1 clay to take the top good = per-card goods stack, animals must be accommodated when taken.
On play grants a build-stable sub-action (free stable, card cost paid separately); passing minor.
On play in work phase lets you place an additional person; passing minor.
Places stone on empty fields, harvested in next field phase; manipulates field crop contents; passing.
Card itself holds up to 1 of each animal type (new holder, not a pasture).
Continuously removes reed requirement from renovate/build-room costs.
On play grants a full Build Fences action with free fences next to field tiles.
Places 4 field tiles on card (stack); each use of Farmland grants plowing up to 2 fields from card.
After using an accumulation space as last action of the work phase, grants a Bake Bread action; needs to know last-placed space type. E-GRANTACT for the Bake Bread action.
On play +2 food; each use of Farmland/Cultivation grants a Bake Bread action.
Lets three named majors be built via Minor Improvement action (extended legality) and reduces their stone cost.
Bonus point per stone room; mutually-exclusive stone-house scoring card.
Negative bonus point per hand card; the no-discard rule is a play restriction, not a mechanic.
Continuous rule adding a 1-food cost (convertible) to placing any new field tile.
After each harvest feeding phase, optionally exchange 1 food for 2 diff building resources or 1 veg.
Immediately after using a specific space, optionally place another person on an accumulation space and gain a good.
Places food on next 8 round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Opponent using Fishing pays owner 1 food first, then 2 food placed on Fishing for that round; must track which rounds used.
After building each stable get food (3 for last); also change one stable's wood cost to clay each build.
In each feeding phase optionally turn 1 veg into 5 food; bonus points for 5th/6th veg.
Places grain on rounds 8/10/12 spaces, collected at start.
After playing an occupation, get 1 vegetable.
Card is a veg-only field; harvested veg can immediately convert to 4 food each.
Wood on remaining even round spaces, collected at start.
Stone on remaining even round spaces, collected at start.
On play (round 3/6/9/12 per prereq) gain plain food; passing minor.
On play gain 1 boar + 1 cattle (must accommodate); passing minor.
In returning-home phase each round, if more rooms than people, pay 1 food to take Family Growth; once per round by nature of hook.
Each feeding phase get 1 food; can no longer hold animals in house.
Each time you build a clay room, may pay an alternative cost formula -> cost-modifier hook on the build-room sub-action, optional.
Each time you use Farmland/Cultivation, may also plow up to 2 fields from field tiles held on the card -> grants plow sub-action; card holds field tiles.
Each time you use Lessons, may play 1 additional occupation for a 2-food cost -> grants a play-occupation action, food cost.
Bonus point per unfenced stable holding exactly 1 of each animal type -> end-game scoring rule (threshold/coverage, not an optimization).
Only a computable play restriction (more rounds left than unused spaces); otherwise just a plain VP -> no mechanic.
Field phase of each harvest: get food by cattle threshold; plus end-game bonus per 2 cattle.
Each time you use a wood accumulation space, if you have a boar, may pay 1 food for 1 bonus point -> buying VP mid-game with food; keyed on named space type.
On play, alternate placing 1 food and 1 sheep on each remaining round space, collected at start of those rounds.
After playing your Nth occupation, get a good/field depending on the running count of occupations played.
On play, place 0/1/2/3 food on next 4 round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
On play, place 1 food on each next round space up to sheep count, collected at start of those rounds.
Immediately before each time you play an occupation (before paying cost), get 3 food.
On play get 6 food; may no longer use round 12-14 action spaces -> permanent self-imposed board restriction on future spaces.
Before each Bake Bread action, may exchange 1 clay for 1 grain (must bake if exchanged) -> convert on the bake sub-action, optional.
Schedules veg on rounds +4/+7; at start of those rounds may buy the veg for 1 food (deferrable per round).
After using Fishing space, optional buy grain/veg for food = conversion; 'after you use' -> T-AFTER.
Card is a field you sow/harvest wood on (counts as 2 fields for yield); wood-as-crop field-yield rule.
Places reed on next 3 round spaces, auto-collected at round start (scheduled goods).
At end of rounds 8/10/12 auto-gain stone per veg field + wood per veg in supply; end-of-round hook per state count.
On play gain 1 sheep; each harvest feeding phase optionally exchange 1 veg for 1 animal of a type you have (feeding-phase animal gain).
Raze all fences then rebuild + add up to 3, counts as building fences; passing minor. Fences returned/replaced without losing animals.
Gain 1 wood per occupation immediately; passing minor. Plain count-based goods.
Gain 1 clay per clay room + major improvement; passing minor. Plain count-based goods.
Choose 3 food or 1 food per sheep (keep sheep); passing minor. Immediate goods with a choice.
Add 1 good to each field holding exactly 1 good; passing minor. Manipulates crops on fields.
On play optionally buy 1 sheep/boar/cattle for 0/1/2 food if accommodatable; passing minor.
Once you have 4 rooms, house holds 5 people; person-capacity change latched on room-count condition.
Card holds 1 cattle per pasture you have; new animal holder scaling with pasture count.

On first renovation (action trigger + once ever -> HOOK on renovate sub-action + CAP-GAME), allows clay-skip renovate-to-stone directly (L-EXT new target, E-SUBSTITUTE) with a 2-stone discount (E-COSTMOD); needs first-flag (ST-STORE).
Each time before using Pig Market space, may take a full Build Fences action (pay wood as usual) -> T-BEFORE, grants a whole action.
On play, may plow 1 field that need not be adjacent (grants plow sub-action + relaxes adjacency legality).
At any time, discard all goods from a planted field (crop manipulation as cost) to plow 1 field (granted plow sub-action).
Each time using Farmland/Cultivation space, may plow 1 additional field -> T-BEFORE grant of plow sub-action.
Each time a Quarry space is revealed, if room, may take Family Growth without placing a person -> HOOK on reveal seam; E-GROWTH without placing.
On play, move the first person placed this phase to this card (worker manip + card holds person, needs placelog), then place another person (extra placement).

Use Day Laborer and adjacent Lessons with one person in order (two spaces one worker -> E-WORKERMANIP); adjacency on board; both then occupied (own-occupancy). PASSIVE-like standing ability but classified as the ability it grants.
At start of the NEXT harvest only, get a Family Growth if room -> fires at harvest start, one-time (CAP-GAME) needing a next-harvest flag.
Each time using Major/House-Redev space, may also play 1 occupation at cost of 1 food (grants the play-occupation action) -> T-BEFORE.

At end of field phase of each harvest, may pay 1 grain for 2 bonus points and give all others 1 food. Timing 'end of field phase' -> after field, before feed; using S-AFTERFEED as nearest field/feed-boundary seam. Note: this is a fired repeatable-reward, not a computed scoring rule, so E-SCORE tag is for the bonus-point granting.
Computed scoring: bonus points = total negative points, capped at 7 -> pure end-game score rule (no HOOK/F-AUTO).
Text is only a play-restriction computable from state (no player has 5+ cards); card otherwise does nothing printed here beyond play -> NONE. (Any effect/VP not stated.)
Tiered end-game bonus points for unplanted fields -> plain threshold/count scoring rule, computed at game end.
After each harvest (immediately after feeding), optionally exchange 1 reed for 1 bonus point; fires per harvest, optional convert-to-VP.
After using a clay accumulation space, optionally exchange 1 clay for 1 VP and place that clay back on the accumulation space (targets specific named clay accumulation spaces).
On play, each other player gains 1 food (gift to opponents).
Each use of Traveling Players also grants 1 bonus point; in 1-3 player games the card itself is an accumulation space (+1 food).
Play cost forks grain->1 veg or reed->4 wood; cost and reward linked = play-variant.
Each time you build a major improvement, place 1 food on each of next 3 round spaces (mandatory schedule).
Each use of Day Laborer also places 1 food on each of next 4 round spaces.
Once per round, pay 1 veg for 1 VP and schedule 1 food onto next 2 round spaces.
On play, place 1 food on each remaining round space up to 3x planted fields (count of remaining round spaces).
After each turn that made at least one unused farmyard space used, get 1 food; needs to track the turn's farmyard change.
In each feeding phase, per empty unfenced stable, optionally exchange 1 grain for 5 food.
On play get 1 food per remaining round; at any time exchange 1 sheep+1 boar for 1 cattle (provides an animal needing accommodation).
Each new wild boar obtained from an action-space effect also grants 1 food; keyed on obtaining a specific good.
Each time a cooking improvement turns 2 goods into food at once, get 1 extra food; keyed on the cook/convert event and its payload.
After field phase each harvest, optional exchange 1 grain + 1 fence piece for 5 food; fence is a supply piece cost.
Feeding phase each harvest: optional turn wood/clay/stone into food; card acts as a cooking-style converter.
On play buy 1 veg for 3 food; at-will discard veg onto a field veg for 4 food (manipulates crop on field).
After using a wood accumulation space, if <=5 wood you get 1 food; specific named-space class, checked before after-triggers.
On play +5 food (return Clay/Stone Oven); before each Bake Bread action can build Clay/Stone Oven major.
On Bake Bread action, once, turn 1 grain into 2 food + 1 bonus point; must bake normally (after).
Each harvest use each cooking improvement once for double food from 1 animal/veg; modifies cooking conversion.
Feeding phase each harvest: exchange 1 supply grain + 1 field grain for 2 bonus points and 4 food.
Once per round, pay 1 grain to place 1 food on each of next 4 round spaces, collected at start of rounds.
Start of each non-harvest round, if >=1 sheep in a pasture, get 1 grain.
After each harvest, with 2 or 3+ supply grain: get 1 food or 1 additional grain respectively (errata: or).
At any time, exchange 3 grain in a field for 1 vegetable in that field; manipulates crops on field.
Breeding phase: if newborns of >=2 types, also get a Sow action (optional granted sub-action).
On play, carry out just the field phase (not a real harvest, own only), then get a Major-or-Minor Improvement action.
After each unconditional Sow, gain 1 grain (auto); from r11 you may choose veg instead. After-timing sub-action hook, own actor; gain is automatic (F-AUTO) with an optional grain/veg swap late-game.
Accrues 1 wood on card each returning-home phase (auto stack); before building a fireplace/hearth/oven, move up to 4 wood off card to pay — a stored goods pile reducing build cost.
Each time using a wood accumulation space, +2 wood. Space-seam hook, own, automatic.
Places 1 clay on next 3 round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Places 1 reed on 5 future round spaces (current+5,7,9,11,13), collected at their start.
Each time you plow a field (incl. playing a field card), you may buy 1 stone for 1 food. Optional post-plow conversion paying food.

On play stock 2 of each resource on card; when any player takes >=5 wood/4 clay/3 reed/3 stone, take 1 of that resource off the card. Obtain-triggered, both actors, from card stack (threshold on the obtain amount).
After using the named Day Laborer space, may pay 2 food to buy 1 of each resource. Optional post-space purchase, food cost.
On play immediately get 2 cattle — animals must be accommodated.
Each non-harvest round, may pay 1 grain to breed exactly 1 animal type outside a breeding phase. Breeding-rule change, deferrable within the round, food-ish(grain) cost.
On play grants an immediate plow completing a zigzag adjacency pattern; passing minor. Shape-dependent plow.
On play grants an immediate Renovation action; passing minor.
On play grants an immediate sow in exactly 1 field; passing minor.
On play get wood equal to stone in supply (plain conditional goods read); passing minor.
On play, gain 1 clay per planted field (plain state-read count); passing minor.
On play, exchange up to 3 wood for 1 stone each; passing minor.
Gain 2 food + 1 grain that must be sown immediately (mandatory grant of sow sub-action); passing.
Continuous capacity increase for size-1 pastures.
At-any-time renovate-to-stone action with a replacement cost formula incl. food; extends renovation-from-wood target.
Before renovating to stone: auto get 2 clay+1 reed and may take a Build Rooms action (goods auto, action optional).
Before using Sheep/Cattle Market space, optionally build exactly 1 stable at reduced/no cost.
Before an unconditional Sow, optionally pay 3 food to plow 1 field.
After each returning-home phase, optionally pay 2 wood+1 food to use Farmland without placing a person.
After using a clay accumulation space, optionally pay 1 clay to plow, placing that clay back on the space; needs to identify the space to return goods (ST-PROV-ish, but space-typed).
Errata: from round 5, each time you get a Minor Improvement action you may take Family Growth instead (needs room).
Place a person on a future round space computed from building-resource count; the person is usable that round (schedules a worker onto a specific round-space).
Card is a private action space; rounds 3-5 renovation action, rounds 6-8 choose veg/boar/cattle; round-band dependent.
With exactly 4 people, place 3rd and 4th person back-to-back (extra consecutive placement); always-on rule change.

cards.new_category: MULTI_IDENTITY: a single card that simultaneously counts as a field + occupation + minor + major (Fireplace), flexibly whichever identity is most convenient for another effect, but never more than one at once.
cards.note: Errata strips Fireplace conversions; acts as a field plus a flexible-identity card counting variously as occupation/minor/major. Multi-identity is the standout mechanic.
Build Joinery/Well via a Minor Improvement action (extends legality), or build both in one Major Improvement action.
At end of each turn in which you renovate (sub-action), optionally exchange one built major for another along a fixed chain.
End-game bonus for having 3/4/5 bottom-row major improvements; plain threshold/count score.
End-game bonus per grain+veg pair across supply and fields; plain count score.
Bonus if you had >=7 goods in fields before the final harvest; needs snapshotting that pre-final-harvest field count.
Bonus per unused farmyard space orthogonally adjacent to your house (if stone house); adjacency-dependent scoring.
Bonus if more stone rooms than people; explicitly mutually-exclusive with other stone-house scoring cards.
Bonus per Nth animal on farm; plain count score with player-count-dependent divisor.
Bonus if <=2 sheep gained from non-breeding sources and no sheep turned to food; needs tracking those provenance counts over the game.
Alternate clay and wild boar on each remaining round space, collected at round start; alternation depends on round-space ordering.
Place 1 food on each remaining round space up to your wood count, collected at those round starts.
Once per round, pay 1 reed to place food on the next 4 round spaces; deferrable, capped per round, targeting specifically the next 4 spaces.
Place 2 food on each remaining round space, collected at those round starts.
Before start of each round, conditional on hand composition (occupations > improvements in hand) get 1 food.
Card is a shared action space granting 1 food on use; before returning-home the person may use another unoccupied space (reuse placed worker).
In returning-home phase each round, if clay>wood in supply get 1 food.
Once per round skip placing second person for 1 food, place later; manipulates worker placement timing.
At start of each work phase, if >=3 food on Fishing space, get 1 food; reads a specific named accumulation space (not L-GEOMBOARD).
Each time you use an action space on round spaces 8-11 get 1 extra food; keyed on specific round-space number band.
Each time you cook a sheep/boar into food get 1 additional food (bonus on cooking conversion).
Place 1 food on each remaining round space, collected at start of those rounds.
At end of each action in which you sow vegetables, get 1 food per vegetable field.
Return a Fireplace (component) to play; at-any-time convert crops/animals to food + bake-bread grain->food conversion. Convert consumes animals. Counts as min or maj improvement.
Return the Pottery to play; at-any-time clay->2 food; end-game bonus points by clay held (threshold-based E-SCORE).
At start of each harvest, if >=3 grain fields get 2 food.
On play get 2 food; during feeding phase of each harvest optionally convert grain->food at a scaling rate.
In field phase get 1 food per harvested field orthogonally adjacent to house (adjacency dependency).
At end of non-harvest rounds you MAY take a Bake Bread action (grain->2food); optional grant, once per qualifying round.
Field phase, if harvest >=2 grain, auto get +1 grain; fires each harvest.
Places grain on next 3 harvest round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Each use of Reed Bank you may pay 1 reed for 1 veg; 4p reed-placement branch irrelevant to 2p.
Before field phase, optionally pay 1 grain to add veg to up to 2 veg fields; manipulates crops on fields, costs grain.
At any time, discard a field's single post-harvest good and take a Sow limited to that field.
Field phase: may harvest 1 extra good from fields equal to unfenced stables; changes field yield rule.
End of turn using Farm Expansion or building improvement, get 1 wood back per 2 wood paid; needs provenance of wood spent.
After feeding phase, if no food left, auto get 1 wood + 1 clay; fires each harvest.
Each time any player renovates to stone, get 1 clay per newly renovated room; fires on own and opponent renovate sub-action.
After building improvement costing >=2 clay, get 1 stone; play cost is 1 Wood/1 Food choice (E-ALTCOST).
Each renovate: pay 1 fewer reed (cost mod) and at end of action get 1 stone.
Improvements on House Redev cost 1 building resource less; fences on Farm Redev cost 3 wood less total. Cost is return/cook a boar.
Each use of Fencing space, also get 1 wild boar; animal must be accommodated. Play cost 2 Food/1 Grain (E-ALTCOST).
On play, grant building up to 3 stables at no cost (stable pieces from supply); passing minor.
On play, renovate wood->clay at no cost; passing.
Return placed person on Grain Utilization home to reuse this round; needs placement log; passing.
Remove all grain from a field, gain 2 wood per grain; crop manipulation + goods; passing.
Take 2 different building resources from accumulation spaces into supply; passing.
Gain building resource of each type you have >=4 of — plain conditional goods from state read; passing.
Turn 1 grain (cost) into 4 food; passing.
Buy 1 vegetable for 2 food (cost); plain goods; passing.
Up to two times spend resources for an animal; must accommodate animals; passing. Immediate on-play; capped twice.
At end of work phase rounds 3&6, move person from Farmland to unoccupied space and take that action, or 1 food; needs placement log.
Card holds animals up to room count, only while pasture orthogonally adjacent to house (adjacency).
Raises capacity of existing unfenced stables and pastures-with-stable.
At any time renovate clay->stone without placing a person, paying normal cost.
Each time all others have more people than you, take a Build Rooms action without placing a person; comparative-count trigger.
After using a wood accumulation space, optionally place 1 stone from supply on that space to take a Build Fences action; stone is a piece placed for next visitor, needs to know which space was used.
Passive: fences on the board edge cost no wood (still use fence pieces); edge = board-shape adjacency.
Each use of Farmland/Cultivation may plow 2 instead of 1 (granted extra plow); passive rule reducing goods placed when sowing (field yield change).
After playing a later minor improvement, may pay 1 food to plow 1 field.
After using Cattle Market, may pay 2 food to plow 1 field.
End of work phase, if occupying both Grain Seeds and Vegetable Seeds spaces, may plow 1 field; needs to know worker placement on named spaces.
May use any Wish for Children space even if occupied.
On play place any food on card; once per round discard 1 food to place a person that round (extra placement without normal action); food stack kept on card.
End of each work phase may sow exactly 1 crop on 1 field (granted sow sub-action).
When getting a Minor Improvement action, may build a major instead — substitutes the granted action.
On play, immediately run the harvest field phase on own farmyard only (harvests planted fields early).
End of work phase in rounds 7 and 9 only, may take a Sow action without placing a person; specific round numbers.
End of work phase may irretrievably add 1 food to card; at any time discard 6 food from card to build a major at no cost; food stack on card.
On play mark round+3; at start of that round may play 1 occupation without paying its cost — a scheduled future benefit tied to a marked round space, waiving the occupation cost.
No effect; plain card played from a prerequisite.
Continuous rule change: newborns require 2 food during feeding instead of 1.
After building/playing each later improvement, may place reed (irretrievably) for bonus points up to room count; accumulated on-card count.
Bonus point per farmyard column containing a room — depends on farm column geometry.
One pasture-with-stable can't hold animals (capacity override); +1 bonus pt each time you get reed from an action space.
2 bonus points if no unused farm spaces at scoring.
Bonus points scaling with having exactly 4/3/2 people.
Continuous restriction: at least one pasture must hold no animals.
On play +1 food; 3 bonus points at scoring if no cattle.
Each use of Fishing may place up to 2 wood on card; scoring counts wood except 1st/4th/7th/10th.
Each harvest may exchange 1 clay for 2 food or 1 bonus point (once per harvest, optional).
Pile goods on card at play; each use of Day Laborer take the top good from the on-card stack.
Places food/clay on remaining even round spaces, collected at start of those rounds.
Places cattle/grain/cattle on next 3 round spaces; cattle are animals needing accommodation.
On play, place food on future round spaces based on stable count; collected at round start.
On play, schedule 1 food on each remaining odd round space.
On play, schedule 1 food on each remaining even round space.
On play, schedule 1 food on next 2 round spaces.
Each time you get wood from an action space, schedule 1 food onto the next round space. Keyed on obtaining wood.
In each harvest feeding phase, gain 1/2 food per house material.
After any player builds a wood room, gain 1 food; fires on own or opponent build-room.
Each time you sow, gain 1 food per different good type sown.
Fishing use stacks food on card; before playing an occupation gain that food. Two hooks; card holds a food stack.
Adding a room stacks food on card; at each feeding phase start gain that amount. Card-held food stack.
Each time you get wild boar outside breeding, optionally convert them to 4 food each.
After playing/building an improvement, may pay 1 extra printed building resource to get 3 food. Cost paid with a building resource of the printed type; note ST-PROV for printed cost type.
Using Fishing, gain extra food scaled by current food on the space; needs the space's food count.
On play place 4 food on card; at each work-phase start, if last in turn order, move 1 food to supply. Card-held depleting stack; turn-order dependent.
Each time you bake grain into bread, gain food per owned animal types; fires on the bake sub-action, conditional on animal holdings.
At start of harvest, optionally skip field+breeding phases for 1 food; alters harvest resolution (skipping field phase).
Each time you use Day Laborer, gain food per sheep on the Sheep Market space (capped 4); reads another space's goods.
On play gain 1 food; each time you pay an occupation cost you may substitute 1 building resource for up to 2 food — changes what occupation play costs.
At start of each harvest, get 4 food; recurring harvest-start gain.
Once per round, if all players have a person left, skip placing a person and take a Bake Bread action instead.
Adds a 1 grain -> 6 food bake conversion rate; on build, immediately take a Bake Bread action.
Adds a 1 grain -> 3 food bake conversion rate; on build, immediately take a Bake Bread action.
On play, gain 1 grain per 2 completed rounds; plain state-read immediate goods.
Each time another player uses the Forest space, you get 1 grain; opponent-action hook.
Each time you use Grain Seeds, gain extra grain per baking improvement owned.
Card is a field where wood is sown/harvested as grain; harvesting last wood also gives 1 veg. Nonstandard field crop (wood) — captured by L-CARDFIELD + E-CROPMANIP.
Card is a veg-only field; harvesting last veg grants an optional plow-1-field sub-action.
Card is a field; removing its last grain/veg lets you immediately sow the other crop on it (a granted sow sub-action on the card-field).
Fires on sow sub-action, optional bonus good; requires field orthogonally adjacent to pasture -> L-GEOMFARM.
Card is a field; during field phase if harvested >=1 good, auto get 1 food.
During field phase, optionally fully harvest one selected field -- changes field-harvest yield rule.
On play place up to 5 fences (pieces) on card as a pool; fences from card are free when building.
Each time you use a wood accumulation space, optionally return 1 stone for +3 wood -- a conversion tied to that space.
On play, optionally return up to 3 stables to supply for 3 wood each.
Each time you get reed/stone from an action space (obtaining), auto +1 clay.
On play single exchange up to 4 building resources for equal number of different building resources.
After you sow in >=1 field, auto get 1 stone.
Card is a special field: only stone plantable, counts as 1 field but plants as 3, sow/harvest stone like vegetables -- nonstandard field-crop rules.
Card is an action space for all; user gets 1 of each building resource type already owned; opponents pay you 1 food (toll).
On play +1 food; then after using Day Laborer space, optionally exchange 1 building resource for another.
At start of breeding phase, if you have an empty unfenced stable, auto get 1 sheep (must be accommodated).
Relaxes sheep-breeding requirement to only 1 sheep; card holds 1 sheep (new holder slot).

Never invent effects the text does not state.
